So I made two major timelines, AD and BC.
BC and AD, I have these timelines where it's five columns, one, two, three, four, five, with one in the middle, two on the sides.

Like, I have an empires section, so you'd have all the different empires, and you'd see where one empire started, the next one ended, and so see where they overlap.
And then if you want to go forward in time, you just click to the next 500 year segment, instantaneously, because it's all in HTML, boom, and the next 500 year segment appears.

So you can trace it forward, and go, you know, start at the beginning of time, 3100 BC, and then go, you know, 2500 to 3000, and then 2000 to 2500, and all the way up to where BC becomes 80, and then go forward in time with the empires.
I also have it divided into different parts of the world, if you want to just follow one part of the world.
